title: Olympium
description: A plugin that allows you to be any Greek God from Olympus!
body:
# ⚡ OLYMPIUM — Divine Classes 1.21.1-1.21.11

![icon](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ebd9707a244286ab82d59fec028466abae9a14df_0.webp)
> *"With great power comes great responsibility... and really cool abilities."*

[This plugin was a custom commission, the user was a scammer so I'm releasing it for free and I will most likely not update it beyond this point.]

---

## 🏛️ Overview

**Olympium** is a Percy Jackson inspired class-based PvP plugin that lets players become demigods, claiming the powers of Greek gods and goddesses. Each deity grants unique abilities, passives, and playstyles for competitive and strategic combat.

**Perfect for:** KitPvP, Factions, Survival Games, Minigames, and any server wanting epic mythological combat!

---

## ⚔️ Features

### 🔱 15 Unique Divine Classes

**The Big Three:**
- ⚡ **Zeus** — Lord of the Sky, Master of Lightning
- 🌊 **Poseidon** — Ruler of the Seas, Controller of Tides  
- 💀 **Hades** — Lord of the Underworld, Master of Death

**The Olympians:**
- 🦉 **Athena** — Goddess of Wisdom and Strategic Warfare
- ☀️ **Apollo** — God of the Sun, Music, and Archery
- 🌙 **Artemis** — Goddess of the Hunt and the Moon
- ⚔️ **Ares** — God of War and Battle
- 🪽 **Hermes** — Messenger of the Gods, Master of Speed
- 🔨 **Hephaestus** — God of Fire and the Forge
- 💕 **Aphrodite** — Goddess of Love and Beauty
- 🍇 **Dionysus** — God of Wine, Festivity, and Madness
- 🌾 **Demeter** — Goddess of the Harvest

**Minor Gods:**
- 🌑 **Hecate** — Goddess of Magic and Necromancy
- 🏆 **Nike** — Goddess of Victory
- ⚖️ **Nemesis** — Goddess of Retribution and Revenge

---

### ✨ Percy Jackson Themed Experience

- **Divine Claiming** — When you select a class, you get "claimed" with dramatic effects:
  - Custom particles burst around you
  - Thunderous sounds announce your deity
  - Personalized messages like *"The sky rumbles with power... Zeus claims you!"*

- **Unique Ability Keybinds** — Abilities trigger with intuitive controls:
  - `Shift + Q` — Primary Ability
  - `F` (empty hand) — Secondary Ability  
  - `Shift + F` — Third Ability (In only some classes)

---

### 🎮 Gameplay Systems

| Feature | Description |
|---------|-------------|
| **Token System** | Players spend tokens to unlock/switch classes |
| **Combat Tagging** | Prevents class switching during combat |
| **Cooldown Display** | Real-time action bar showing ability cooldowns |
| **Scoreboard** | Displays class, tokens, and combat status |
| **Class Manual** | Auto-given book explaining your abilities |
| **GUI Selection** | Beautiful inventory-based class picker |

---

## 📋 Commands

| Command | Description | Permission |
|---------|-------------|------------|
| `/olympium class` | Open class selection GUI | `olympium.use` |
| `/olympium info` | View your current class abilities | `olympium.use` |
| `/olympium tokens` | Check your token balance | `olympium.use` |
| `/olympium reload` | Reload configuration | `olympium.reload` |
| `/olympium help` | Show help menu | `olympium.use` |

**Aliases:** `/oly`, `/divine`

---

## ⚙️ Configuration

Everything is fully configurable:

- **Class abilities** — Customize damage, cooldowns, ranges, durations
- **Token costs** — Set how many tokens each class requires
- **GUI layout** — Change slots, titles, and materials
- **Messages** — Full MiniMessage format support
- **Scoreboard** — Customizable lines and placeholders
- **Selection effects** — Modify sounds and particles per class

---

## 📦 Dependencies

| Plugin | Required | Link |
|--------|----------|------|
| **PacketEvents** | ✅ Yes | [Download](https://modrinth.com/plugin/packetevents) |
| **PlaceholderAPI** | ❌ Optional | [Download](https://www.spigotmc.org/resources/placeholderapi.6245/) |

---

## 🔧 Installation

1. Download **PacketEvents** and place in `/plugins/`
2. Download **Olympium** and place in `/plugins/`
3. Restart your server
4. Configure classes in `/plugins/Olympium/classes/`
5. Enjoy divine combat! ⚡

---

## 📊 Supported Versions

| Version | Status |
|---------|--------|
| 1.21.x | ✅ Fully Supported |
| 1.20.x | ✅ Supported |
| 1.19.x | ⚠️ Should Work |

---

- 15 divine classes
- Full ability system
- Token economy
- Percy Jackson themed claiming effects
